message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 80
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Ship Captain" as SC
participant ":System" as SYS

SC -> SYS : 1 wants to check the audit trail of a given container of a given cargo manifest
SYS --> SC : 2 asks for data(cargo manifest id, container id)
SC -> SYS : 3 inserts needed data
SYS --> SC : 4 returns the audit trail in chronological order

@enduml
